---
title: "Website roadmap"
page-layout: full
---

:::: {.hero}
:::: {.container}
# Website roadmap

This page is the **navigation contract** for the Quarto site: a recommended linear reading path plus goal-oriented tracks.

[Start](start/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Examples](examples/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
[Package roadmap](package-roadmap.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
::::
::::

## Recommended path (first-time users)

Use this if you want a single, low-friction learning sequence.

1. **Orientation**
   - [Start hub](start/index.qmd)
   - [Roadmap (start section)](start/roadmap.qmd)
   - [Usage diagrams](start/usage-diagrams.qmd) (choose wrapper/fit/predict routes)
2. **First successful run**
   - [Start here](start/start-here.qmd)
   - [Basic compile and run](start/basic-model-compile-run.qmd)
   - [Backends and workflow map](start/backends-and-workflow.qmd)
3. **Template-based work**
   - [Examples hub](examples/index.qmd) (unconditional → conditional → causal → clustering)
4. **Model understanding**
   - [Advanced hub](advanced/index.qmd)
   - [Model umbrella](advanced/model-umbrella.qmd)
   - [Theory background](advanced/theory/index.qmd)
5. **Exact interfaces**
   - [Reference hub](reference.qmd)
   - [pkgdown API reference](pkgdown/reference/index.html)

## Tracks (choose by goal)

Each track is a curated set of pages with explicit prerequisites and “next steps”.

- **Quickstart**: [Track: Quickstart](tracks/quickstart.qmd)
- **Modeling (1-arm)**: [Track: Modeling](tracks/modeling.qmd)
- **Causal**: [Track: Causal](tracks/causal.qmd)
- **Clustering**: [Track: Clustering](tracks/clustering.qmd)
- **Kernels & tails**: [Track: Kernels](tracks/kernels.qmd)
- **Customization**: [Track: Customization](tracks/customization.qmd)

## Quarto vs pkgdown split (why two sites)

- **Quarto (this site)**: narrative, workflows, comparisons, and “how to think about choices”. It is optimized for reading and learning.
- **pkgdown**: authoritative **function signatures**, arguments, return objects, and examples.

When in doubt: learn the workflow here, then confirm details in pkgdown.

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Index](index.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
